name: Wayback Machine - Internet Archive
snippet: The Wayback Machine is an initiative of the Internet Archive, a 501(c)(3) non-profit, building a digital library of Internet sites and other cultural artifacts ...

name: Wayback Machine - Internet Archive
snippet: Search the history of more than 1 trillion web pages. Search the Wayback Machine An illustration of a magnifying glass.

name: Using the Wayback Machine - Internet Archive Help Center
snippet: Whatever archives we have are viewable in the Wayback Machine. The best way to see all the files we have archived of the site is: http://web.archive.org/*/www.

name: PC Mag: How to View a Cached Version of a Website
snippet: Not all websites are indexed by Google or saved in a cache, but for those that are, here's how to access them. Read full text.

name: Archived Web - Visit offline websites by searching cached pages
snippet: ArchivedWeb.com allows you to visit temporarily offline or archived versions of websites via popular search engines, like Google and Bing.
